Document:
# Synthetics
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Synthetics"/]
◈ Synthetics ◈ Player-Controlled Robotics ◈ Wendover Region ◈
[bold]Synthetics[/bold]
◈ FACTION DOSSIER ◈
[bold]Status[/bold] Active - Operational [bold]Location[/bold] Wendover Region, Utah [bold]Commander[/bold] N/A - Programming Directive [bold]Ideology[/bold] Directive Compliance Pre-War Operational Parameters [bold]Motto[/bold] [italic]Please stand back.[/italic] [bold]Affiliation[/bold] Independent / Faction-Assigned ⬜ RESTRICTED ACCESS ⬜
[bold]Synthetics[/bold] are pre-war robotic units still operational in the Wendover region. Unlike the hostile NPC robots encountered in the wastes, these are [bold]player-controlled[/bold] units - each with distinct chassis, built-in armaments, and specialized roles. All Synthetic roles require [bold]whitelist approval[/bold] and are [bold]species-locked[/bold] to their corresponding robot chassis.
Synthetics cannot pick up or equip conventional firearms. Their armament is integrated into their chassis and cannot be changed.
## Chassis Overview
[bold]Chassis[/bold] [bold]Role[/bold] [bold]Walk / Sprint[/bold] [bold]HP[/bold] [bold]Built-In Weapon[/bold] [bold]Armor[/bold] Mr. Handy Domestic - cleaning, gardening, general maintenance 2.5 / 4.5 200 Flamer (30 fuel) None [bold]Protectron[/bold] Civil Service - utility, patrol, civic duties 2.0 / 3.5 200 Hand-Laser (9 cap) 0.7× blunt/slash [bold]Protectron Police[/bold] Law Enforcement - detainment, patrols 2.0 / 3.5 200 Electro-Shock (10 blunt + 12 shock) 0.7× blunt/slash [bold]Protectron Builder[/bold] Engineering - construction, repair 2.0 / 3.5 200 RCD + construction tools 0.7× blunt/slash [bold]Protectron Firefighter[/bold] Emergency - fire suppression, rescue 2.0 / 3.5 200 Cryo Emitter (6 cap) 0.7× blunt/slash [bold]Mr. Gutsy[/bold] Military - combat patrol, area denial 2.5 / 4.5 200 Plasma Caster (15 cap) None [bold]Assaultron[/bold] Combat - close-quarters assault 3.0 / 6.0 200 Head Laser (charged, 2s charge + 3s cooldown) + Claw (30 slash) None [bold]Assaultron Tesla[/bold] Combat - area denial, chain lightning 3.0 / 6.0 200 Tesla Discharge (arcing chain-lightning) None Sentry Bot Minigun Heavy Siege - suppression, defense 1.0 / 1.5 [bold]350[/bold] 5mm Gatling (30 cap) [bold]0.65×[/bold] + 50% reflect Sentry Bot Laser Heavy Siege - suppression, defense 1.0 / 1.5 [bold]350[/bold] Gatling Laser (20 cap) [bold]0.65×[/bold] + 50% reflect [bold]Robobrain[/bold] Medical / Utility - diagnosis, treatment 1.5 / 3.0 200 None (tool + medical modules) None [bold]Robobrain Laser[/bold] Medical / Combat - mixed role 1.5 / 3.0 200 Hand-Laser (9 cap) None
[bold]Sentry Bots[/bold] are [bold]2.0× scale[/bold] - visually massive and physically imposing
[bold]All other robots[/bold] are standard 1.0× scale
## Synthetic Jobs
[bold]Job[/bold] [bold]Chassis Options[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] Mr. Handy Mr. Handy Whitelist, 3-handed [bold]Protectron[/bold] Protectron, Police, Builder, Firefighter Whitelist, 4 model variants [bold]Mr. Gutsy[/bold] Mr. Gutsy Whitelist, military [bold]Assaultron[/bold] Assaultron, Assaultron Tesla Whitelist, fastest chassis [bold]Sentry Bot[/bold] Sentry Bot Minigun, Sentry Bot Laser Whitelist, heaviest chassis [bold]Robobrain[/bold] Robobrain, Robobrain Laser Whitelist, medical focus
All Synthetic jobs require [bold]whitelisted: true[/bold] status and restrict the player to robot-specific species and customization.
## Borg Modules
Synthetics carry integrated modules that define their utility beyond combat:
[bold]Module[/bold] [bold]Function[/bold] [bold]Integrated Hand-Laser[/bold] Semi-auto laser, 9 capacity, rechargeable [bold]Plasma Caster[/bold] Plasma projector, internal battery, self-recharging [bold]Integrated Flamer[/bold] Full-auto incendiary, 30 fuel, auto-refill [bold]Cryo Emitter[/bold] Cryo projector, 6 capacity, fire suppression [bold]Security Module[/bold] Stun baton, handcuffs, flashlight - law enforcement loadout [bold]Diagnosis Module[/bold] Medical scanner and patient assessment [bold]Treatment Module[/bold] Medical treatment - surgical tools, healing capability [bold]Tool Module[/bold] Engineering tools - wrench, screwdriver, welder [bold]GPS Module[/bold] Navigation and mapping - ties into Wendover tactical map
## Hostile NPC Robots
The Wasteland is home to many [bold]hostile NPC robots[/bold] that are [bold]not[/bold] player-controlled. These are pre-war units whose programming has degraded into permanent hostility. They belong to the [bold]HostileRobot[/bold] NPC faction and attack on sight.
[bold]NPC Robot[/bold] [bold]HP[/bold] [bold]Armament[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] Protectron (Melee) 100 Melee (5 brute) Slow patrol, weakest NPC robot Protectron Police 100 Hand-Laser (9 cap) Ranged, slightly more dangerous Mr. Handy (Claw / Saw / Gun) 100 Claw / Saw / Hand-Laser Three variants, domestic-speed Mr. Gutsy 100 Plasma Caster (9 cap) Military variant, same HP as Mr. Handy Assaultron 200 Claw (15 slash) Fast (3.0/6.0), melee-focused Eyebot 100 Hand-Laser (9 cap) Fast scout, plays ambient music Robobrain 100 Hand-Laser (9 cap) Slow, ranged Sentry Bot (Gatling Laser) [bold]350[/bold] Gatling Laser (6 shots/sec) + Stomp (40 brute) 2× scale, heavy armor, [bold]8-second death explosion[/bold] Sentry Bot (Ballistic) [bold]350[/bold] Missile Launcher 2× scale, heavy armor
[bold]Warning:[/bold] NPC Sentry Bots explode on death with an 8-second fuse. Clear the area immediately.
## Equipment
[bold]Item[/bold] [bold]Description[/bold] [bold]General Atomics Navigation Card[/bold] Wendover tactical map - standard issue [bold]RobCo Industries Navigation Card[/bold] Wendover tactical map - RobCo branded [bold]Wasteland Scrap Headset[/bold] Inter-robot and faction communication radio
